title: Create Railways Navigator
description: A Minecraft Create Mod addon that adds several new features related to train navigation, such as improved display boards, a navigator for searching routes, new schedule entries, and more.
body:
# 🚅 Create Railways Navigator (CRN) A Minecraft Create Mod addon that adds several new features related to train navigation, such as improved display boards, a navigator for searching routes, new schedule entries, and more.

## 🧩 Dependencies [![](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.3.1/assets/cozy/requires/create_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MisterJulsen/mod-resources/refs/heads/main/data/dragonlib_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragonlib) - This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) or [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric). - Versions with `C6` are compatible with Create 6, versions without this suffix are compatible with Create 5 (unless Create 6 is the only version available for that Minecraft version) - Version `>= 0.9.0` require [DragonLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragonlib) to be installed! Older versions `<= 0.8.5` do **NOT** require DragonLib! Delete it from your mods folder. [Please read this post to see which versions of my other mods are compatible with each other](https://wiki.mrjulsen.net/blog/2026/03/01/dragonlib-3-compatibility/). ## ✅ Features ### Navigator Use the Navigator which is inspired by the DB Navigator, to find routes between two stations on your rail network. You will also see the departure times, delays, and other details about your journey. ### Advanced Displays An improved version of Create's Display Boards, specifically designed for trains and stations. They show more detailed information about departing trains, such as the platform, line, delays, and other information. These displays can also be placed directly on the trains themselves, showing information such as the next stop or the terminus station. ### New Schedule Instructions Distribute your trains evenly along your route with the Train Separation Instruction, use a more advanced version of wildcards with Prioritized Destination Instruction, or define the terminus with the Schedule Sections. ... and more features related to train navigation... ## 🤝 Contribute Thanks to all the people who are helping with development and translating the mod into different languages. This project is open source, so if you'd like to help with development or localization, feel free to create pull requests or issues on GitHub and visit our Crowdin page. [![](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.3.1/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/MisterJulsen/Create-Train-Navigator) [![](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.3.1/assets/cozy/translate/crowdin_vector.svg)](https://crowdin.com/project/create-railways-navigator) ## ⚠️ Please note! To protect your worlds, you should always create a backup before installing an update of this mod. Alpha versions in particular may contain critical bugs! I am not responsible for any damage caused to your worlds by this mod if you ignore this warning!
